docs.text: FujiHack FujiHack is a free and open-source firmware patch for Fujifilm X/GFX/HS/F cameras. Currently FujiHack is not stable and shouldn't be run on production cameras. FujiHack will only work on a very specific RTOS and firmware type. You can put your firmware file into the web patcher to see if FujiHack supports your firmware type. In general, FujiHack does NOT support the XP and S series Fujifilm cameras, and anything older than 2005.
docs.title: FujiHack
